violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the the front retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment has work order in already. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

The floor in the retail area under shelving was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
